Title: Freelance Data Science Engineer (Python & SQL)
Description:
Please submit your CV in English and indicate your level of English proficiency.

Mindrift connects specialists with project-based AI opportunities for leading tech companies, focused on testing, evaluating, and improving AI systems. Participation is project-based, not permanent employment.

What This Opportunity Involves

While each project involves unique tasks, contributors may:


Design original computational data science problems that simulate real-world analytical workflows across industries (telecom, finance, government, e-commerce, healthcare)
Create problems requiring Python programming to solve (using Pandas, Numpy, Scipy, Sklearn, Statsmodels, Matplotlib, Seaborn)
Ensure problems are computationally intensive and cannot be solved manually within reasonable timeframes (days/weeks)
Develop problems requiring non-trivial reasoning chains in data processing, statistical analysis, feature engineering, predictive modeling, and insight extraction
Create deterministic problems with reproducible answers: avoid stochastic elements or require fixed random seeds for exact reproducibility
Base problems on real business challenges: customer analytics, risk assessment, fraud detection, forecasting, optimization, and operational efficiency
Design end-to-end problems spanning the complete data science pipeline (data ingestion → cleaning → EDA → modeling → validation → deployment considerations)
Incorporate big data processing scenarios requiring scalable computational approaches
Verify solutions using Python with standard data science libraries and statistical methods
Document problem statements clearly with realistic business contexts and provide verified correct answers


What We Look For

This opportunity is a good fit for Data Science specialists with an experience in python open to part-time, non-permanent projects. Ideally, contributors will have:


5+ years of hands-on data science experience with proven business impact
Portfolio of completed projects and publications showcasing real-world problem-solving
Expert Python programming for data science (pandas, numpy, scipy, scikit-learn, statsmodels)
Expert statistical analysis and machine learning - deep understanding of algorithms, methods, and their practical applications
Expert with SQL and database operations for data manipulation and analysis
Experience with GenAI technologies (LLMs, RAG, prompt engineering, vector databases)
Understanding of MLOps practices and model deployment workflows
Knowledge of modern frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain)
Strong written English (C1+)


How It Works

Apply → Pass qualification(s) → Join a project → Complete tasks → Get paid

Project time expectations

For this project, tasks are estimated to require around 10-20 hours per week during active phases, based on project requirements. This is an estimate, not a guaranteed workload, and applies only while the project is active.

Compensation

On this project, contributors can earn up to $34 per hour equivalent, depending on their level and pace of contribution.

Compensation varies across projects depending on scope, complexity, and required expertise. Please note that other projects on the platform may offer different earning levels based on their requirements.

Title: Analista de datos
Description:
Descripción de la oferta En nuestro Programa Talento Joven buscamos personas recién tituladas en Formación Profesional o recién graduadas en universidad en informática, análisis de datos o programación, con interés en adquirir experiencia y conocimientos prácticos en el campo del Data Science y el análisis de datos.




Funciones:

Participar en un programa formativo de 30 semanas enfocado en habilidades técnicas y prácticas de análisis de datos
Trabajar sobre proyectos reales y simulaciones del entorno empresarial, incluyendo retos de predicción, análisis exploratorio y visualización de datos
Colaborar y aprender directamente de profesionales en activo que te acompañarán durante tu evolución
Practicar con herramientas como Python, SQL, Pandas, Power BI, Jupyter Notebooks y Scikit-learn
Aplicar procedimientos y buenas prácticas de análisis en entornos controlados de laboratorio







Lo que ofrecemos:

Plan formativo diseñado y actualizado según las necesidades reales del mercado laboral en data
Formación práctica, en grupo reducido, orientada al trabajo que se realiza en equipos de data science
Mentoring personalizado con especialistas del sector
Posibilidad real de entrevista para ofertas de empleo al finalizar el programa en empresas colaboradoras
Red de contacto con profesionales y exalumnos del programa







Requisitos:

Ciclo Formativo de Grado Medio o Superior relacionado con informática, análisis de datos o programación, o Grado universitario en Ingeniería Informática, Matemáticas, Estadística o disciplinas relacionadas con datos
Interés por el análisis de datos y motivación para afrontar retos prácticos
Capacidad para trabajar en equipo, comunicarte y aprender en un entorno técnico







Tipo de puesto: Formativo/Prácticas Ubicación: Modalidad híbrida (presencial y online)

Duración: 30 semanas Incorporación: Octubre 2026

Title: Analista de bases de datos
Place: Tres Cantos, Community of Madrid, Spain
Description:
Analista de Bases de Datos




Sobre Akkodis

En Akkodis combinamos soluciones digitales y de ingeniería para construir un futuro más inteligente. Con presencia en más de 30 países en Europa, Asia y América, impulsamos la innovación mediante talento y tecnología, desarrollando soluciones de vanguardia para los retos más complejos del mundo.

Estamos ampliando nuestro equipo y buscamos un/a Analista de Bases de Datos para incorporarse a un proyecto estable con grandes oportunidades de crecimiento. Tu misión será garantizar la integridad, disponibilidad, consistencia y correcta estructuración de la información en entornos SQL/Oracle, así como apoyar la mejora continua de los procesos de datos corporativos.




🎯 ¿Qué harás en tu día a día? — Funciones orientadas a Analista de BD

🔹 Analizar, modelar y documentar estructuras de datos: tablas, relaciones, claves, reglas de negocio y procesos asociados.

🔹 Diseñar, optimizar y mantener consultas SQL complejas (joins, CTEs, funciones analíticas, agregaciones).

🔹 Asegurar la calidad e integridad del dato mediante verificaciones, controles de consistencia y validaciones entre orígenes y destinos.

🔹 Gestionar y mejorar procesos de carga de datos (ETL/Lite ETL) desde distintas fuentes: SAP, Oracle, Excel u otros sistemas corporativos.

🔹 Crear y mantener tablas intermedias y finales, incluyendo criterios de cálculo, dependencias y flujos de transformación.

🔹 Detectar incidencias, analizar causas raíz y proponer acciones correctivas en colaboración con equipos de Datos/BI/IT.

🔹 Elaborar documentación funcional y técnica: diccionarios de datos, modelos lógicos/físicos, mapeos de origen–destino y manuales de proceso.

🔹 Apoyar la generación de reporting técnico y evidencias para auditoría, calidad de datos y cumplimiento interno.

🔹 Participar en la mejora continua del modelo de datos, estándares y buenas prácticas.




🧩 Eres la persona ideal si cuentas con…

✅ Al menos 3 años de experiencia trabajando con Bases de Datos en entornos corporativos.

✅ Dominio de SQL (Oracle muy valorado): consultas complejas, funciones analíticas, manejo avanzado de fechas y modelado relacional.

✅ Experiencia en análisis y estructuración de datos: detección de inconsistencias, normalización, mapeos origen–destino.

✅ Capacidad para documentar procesos, estructuras y reglas de negocio con rigor técnico.

✅ Conocimientos de entornos y herramientas como:

SQL / Oracle
Excel avanzado
Power BI (para análisis puntual y validaciones visuales)
(Valorable) Diligent HighBond
(Opcional) Git, Jira/Confluence, ServiceNow




⭐ Valoraremos positivamente que tengas…

✔ Experiencia en entornos de auditoría, reporting o modelos regulatorios.

✔ Experiencia previa en modelado de bases de datos o administración de datos en entornos corporativos.

✔ Conocimientos en validación de indicadores o controles periódicos de consistencia.

✔ Familiaridad con métricas financieras o procesos de negocio.

✔ Capacidad analítica, pensamiento crítico y orientación a la mejora continua.

✔ Habilidades de comunicación, organización y trabajo colaborativo.




🎁 ¿Qué ofrecemos en Akkodis?

📄 Contrato indefinido.

🏠 Modelo híbrido: 3 días presencial por semana en CP 28760.

🌍 Integración en una multinacional líder en tecnología.

✨ Beneficios flexibles: tickets restaurante, transporte, seguro de salud…

📚 Formación continua y acceso a programas de desarrollo.

💸 Descuentos y ventajas exclusivas para personal Akkodis.

Title: Analista Digital / Data Analyst
Description:
¿Te apasiona transformar datos en decisiones?




Buscamos una persona con experiencia en analítica digital que quiera participar activamente en la comprensión y evolución de audiencias digitales, convirtiendo el comportamiento de los usuarios en insights que impulsen decisiones estratégicas.




Formarás parte de un equipo de Analítica con una fuerte conexión con negocio, trabajando de manera transversal con áreas como SEO, contenidos y stakeholders clave para identificar oportunidades de crecimiento, optimizar resultados y mejorar la comprensión de la audiencia.




¿Cuál será tu misión?




Serás responsable de analizar la evolución del tráfico, el consumo y el engagement de los usuarios, identificando tendencias, patrones y oportunidades de mejora a partir de los datos.




Entre tus principales responsabilidades estarán:

📊 Analizar datos de audiencia digital mediante Google Analytics 4 y BigQuery.

📈 Diseñar y mantener dashboards e informes en Looker Studio orientados a negocio y perfiles no técnicos.

🎯 Extraer insights accionables y comunicar conclusiones de forma clara a diferentes áreas de la organización.

🏷️ Participar en la definición y mantenimiento de planes de medición y estrategias de etiquetado, garantizando la calidad y consistencia del dato.

✅ Validar la calidad de la información, identificando posibles incidencias y asegurando la trazabilidad de las métricas.

🤝 Colaborar con equipos de negocio, SEO y contenido para garantizar una correcta medición del rendimiento digital.




¿Qué buscamos?

Experiencia trabajando con Google Analytics 4 (GA4).
Experiencia desarrollando dashboards en Looker Studio.
Conocimientos de BigQuery.
Capacidad para interpretar datos y transformarlos en recomendaciones de negocio.
Experiencia trabajando con KPIs digitales y métricas de rendimiento.
Buenas habilidades de comunicación y capacidad para presentar resultados a diferentes interlocutores.
Manejo avanzado de Excel y PowerPoint.




Valoraremos especialmente

⭐ Experiencia previa en medios digitales, publishers o entornos editoriales.

⭐ Conocimientos de Comscore, GfK o herramientas de medición de audiencias.

⭐ Experiencia con Tableau u otras herramientas de Business Intelligence.

⭐ Familiaridad con Marfeel y ecosistemas de contenido digital.




¿Qué encontrarás?

Un entorno donde la analítica tiene impacto real en la toma de decisiones.
Colaboración directa con áreas estratégicas del negocio.
Modalidad híbrida (1 día presencial).
Un proyecto en el que los datos son un elemento clave para impulsar el crecimiento y la innovación.




Si disfrutas convirtiendo datos en historias, tendencias en oportunidades e información en decisiones, nos encantará conocerte.

HTML:
¿Te apasiona transformar datos en decisiones?


Buscamos una persona con experiencia en analítica digital que quiera participar activamente en la comprensión y evolución de audiencias digitales, convirtiendo el comportamiento de los usuarios en insights que impulsen decisiones estratégicas.


Formarás parte de un equipo de Analítica con una fuerte conexión con negocio, trabajando de manera transversal con áreas como SEO, contenidos y stakeholders clave para identificar oportunidades de crecimiento, optimizar resultados y mejorar la comprensión de la audiencia.


¿Cuál será tu misión?


Serás responsable de analizar la evolución del tráfico, el consumo y el engagement de los usuarios, identificando tendencias, patrones y oportunidades de mejora a partir de los datos.


Entre tus principales responsabilidades estarán:

📊 Analizar datos de audiencia digital mediante Google Analytics 4 y BigQuery.

📈 Diseñar y mantener dashboards e informes en Looker Studio orientados a negocio y perfiles no técnicos.

🎯 Extraer insights accionables y comunicar conclusiones de forma clara a diferentes áreas de la organización.

🏷️ Participar en la definición y mantenimiento de planes de medición y estrategias de etiquetado, garantizando la calidad y consistencia del dato.

✅ Validar la calidad de la información, identificando posibles incidencias y asegurando la trazabilidad de las métricas.

🤝 Colaborar con equipos de negocio, SEO y contenido para garantizar una correcta medición del rendimiento digital.


¿Qué buscamos?

  • Experiencia trabajando con Google Analytics 4 (GA4).
  • Experiencia desarrollando dashboards en Looker Studio.
  • Conocimientos de BigQuery.
  • Capacidad para interpretar datos y transformarlos en recomendaciones de negocio.
  • Experiencia trabajando con KPIs digitales y métricas de rendimiento.
  • Buenas habilidades de comunicación y capacidad para presentar resultados a diferentes interlocutores.
  • Manejo avanzado de Excel y PowerPoint.


Valoraremos especialmente

⭐ Experiencia previa en medios digitales, publishers o entornos editoriales.

⭐ Conocimientos de Comscore, GfK o herramientas de medición de audiencias.

⭐ Experiencia con Tableau u otras herramientas de Business Intelligence.

⭐ Familiaridad con Marfeel y ecosistemas de contenido digital.


¿Qué encontrarás?

  • Un entorno donde la analítica tiene impacto real en la toma de decisiones.
  • Colaboración directa con áreas estratégicas del negocio.
  • Modalidad híbrida (1 día presencial).
  • Un proyecto en el que los datos son un elemento clave para impulsar el crecimiento y la innovación.


Si disfrutas convirtiendo datos en historias, tendencias en oportunidades e información en decisiones, nos encantará conocerte.

Title: Administrativo/a
Description:
POSICIÓN Y DEPARTAMENTO





Administrativo/a


Sin equipo a cargo.



FUNCIONES, TAREAS Y RESPONSABILIDADES



Asistir al departamento u oficina asignado en tareas administrativas.


Preparación documentación e informes de reporte en lo referente a su trabajo.


Gestión de firmas (manuscritas y digitales)


Registrar, procesar y transmitir documentos, facturas, hojas de gastos, correos electrónicos y cualquier otro tipo de información en el ámbito de su trabajo.


Comprobación de albaranes y revisión de facturas.


Registrar y mantener actualizada la documentación relacionada y generada.





¿QUÉ OFRECEMOS?





Buen ambiente de trabajo


Tipo contrato: Temporal.


Jornada: completa, 40 horas/semana


Horario: L a J 8 horas y media. V 6 horas.


Modalidad presencial.


Convenio Sector Metal de Madrid.


Categoría/Grupo /Nivel: según convenio, administrativo/a


Vacaciones: 22 días por convenio.


Fecha de incorporación: inmediata.


Centro de trabajo: Av. de Tenerife, 4. IKUBICO Park, Ed. Kristal. 28703 San Sebastián de los Reyes, Madrid.





REQUISITOS DEL PERFIL





Formación: Grado medio o superior en administración y finanzas o gestión administrativa.


Conocimientos: Gestión documental. word, excel y power point.


Experiencia: Al menos 2 años en tareas similares a las de la posición.


Idiomas: deseable inglés mínimo B2.


Software: Manejo del paquete Microsoft Office.


Viajes: no aplica.


Cualidades para trabajar en equipo.


Proactividad.


Persona orientada a resultados, técnica y analítica.


Análisis y tratamiento de la información.


Flexible y adaptable a entornos híbridos


Habilidades de comunicación (escrita y oral ).


Planificación y organización


Persona rigurosa, lógica, metódica, gran capacidad de escucha y análisis, con gran orientación a la resolución de problemas, consecución de resultados.


Capacidad para realizar y gestionar múltiples tareas y proyectos al mismo tiempo


Integridad





PROCESO DE SELECCIÓN




En REBI valoramos el talento sin importar raza, color, religión, edad, género, orientación sexual, identidad de género, origen nacional, discapacidad u otras circunstancias personales o sociales. Promovemos la igualdad de oportunidades, enfocándonos en identificar y desarrollar el potencial de las personas basándonos únicamente en sus capacidades laborales, siempre desde el respeto a la diversidad y la no discriminación.




1⃣ Envía tu currículum: No te liaremos rellenando mil campos, es simple, solo necesitas cargar tu CV, y unas breves preguntas.

2⃣ Preselección : Si tu perfil encaja con nuestros requisitos, contactaremos contigo para conocernos a través de una video entrevista, en algunas ocasiones precedida de una breve entrevista telefónica.

3⃣ Entrevista: Sí tu perfil encaja en nuestro equipo , nos pondremos en contacto contigo para una entrevista en nuestras instalaciones (pueden también realizarse pruebas técnicas o de idiomas de las que te informaremos previamente).

4⃣ Tanto si has sido seleccionado como si no, nuestro equipo contactará contigo.

Title: Técnico de selección de personal
Description:
En Grupo Zelenza, actualmente nos encontramos en búsqueda de personal para incorporar un Técnico/a de Selección de personal, con o sin discapacidad, para incorporarse al equipo de estructura de la compañía.




Tus principales responsabilidades incluirán:

Fuentes de reclutamiento: Utilizar diversas fuentes y canales de reclutamiento, como anuncios en línea, redes sociales, bases de datos de candidatos, entre otros, para identificar y atraer a los mejores perfiles.
Técnicas de entrevista: Diseñar y aplicar entrevistas efectivas, basadas en competencias, para evaluar las habilidades, experiencia y motivación de los candidatos.
Consultoría de recursos humanos: Brindar asesoramiento y recomendaciones a nuestros clientes sobre las mejores prácticas en selección de personal, evaluación de competencias y gestión del talento.
Selección de personal: Realizar un cribado exhaustivo de los candidatos, realizar entrevistas y pruebas de evaluación, y recomendar a los mejores perfiles para cubrir las vacantes.
Evaluación por competencias: Aplicar herramientas y metodologías de evaluación por competencias para identificar el ajuste entre los candidatos y los requisitos del puesto.
Psicología: Utilizar conocimientos en psicología organizacional para comprender mejor los comportamientos y perfiles de los candidatos.
Entrevistas: Llevar a cabo entrevistas estructuradas y dirigidas a obtener información relevante sobre los candidatos.
Preparación de entrevistas: Preparar y planificar las entrevistas de manera cuidadosa, considerando los objetivos de evaluación y las competencias requeridas.
Cribado de alto rendimiento: Implementar estrategias efectivas de cribado y selección para identificar a los candidatos más destacados y adecuados para los puestos.
Entrevistas basadas en las competencias: Diseñar y aplicar entrevistas que se centren en la evaluación de las competencias clave requeridas para el puesto.




*Ubicación: Avenida San Diego, 1. Madrid*

Salario: 17.094 - 21.000€ Negociable.




¿Qué podemos ofrecerte?




* Incorporación a una compañía con más de 2.500 profesionales y con un amplio abanico de proyectos retadores para clientes líderes en sus sectores de actividad con presencia nacional e internacional.

* Crecimiento y desarrollo profesional.

* Estabilidad laboral.

* Buen ambiente de trabajo.

* Formación continua.




Si crees que lo que te hemos contado encaja con tus necesidades y proyección, ¡no dudes en inscribirte! ¿Te unes al equipo?

Title: Candidatura Espontánea en Joinrs
Description:
En Joinrs trabajamos duro y soñamos en grande. ¡Únete a nosotros para vivir la emoción de un nuevo comienzo!




Estamos siempre en busca de estudiantes, recién graduados y perfiles junior que quieran unirse a nuestro equipo: postúlate a esta posición y nuestro equipo de HR se pondrá en contacto contigo en cuanto abramos una vacante y tu CV encaje con lo que estamos buscando.




Para todas las posiciones ofrecemos un contrato de prácticas remuneradas de 6 meses (1.000 € al mes + vales de comida, con posibilidad de contratación) o un contrato indefinido (salario inicial: 22.500 € – 27.500 €), según el equipo y la experiencia del candidato. Tendrás la oportunidad de formarte día a día con training on the job, trabajar desde una de nuestras oficinas o, si lo prefieres, en full remote, además de contar con vacaciones ilimitadas. Recibirás un MacBook de última generación.




Buscamos personas sin experiencia o con un máximo de 2 años de experiencia.

--




Quiénes somos

Somos un equipo unido que cree con fuerza en su misión: revolucionar la búsqueda de empleo, cerrando la brecha entre el mundo universitario y las empresas, ayudando a cada recién graduado a descubrir su potencial y a vivir el inicio de su carrera con el optimismo de una perspectiva clara.




Trabajamos juntos, compartimos ideas y conseguimos resultados que nos motivan a alcanzar metas cada vez más ambiciosas. Somos emprendedores, tenemos un enfoque tech-driven y buscamos constantemente feedback. Nos inspira la diversidad, somos inclusivos y ¡unos optimistas imparables!




Nuestra comunidad ya cuenta con más de 1,5 millones de inscritos en Italia, UK, España, Brasil, Francia, Portugal y Alemania, y más de 1.200 empresas como PwC, Sisal, Gi Group, Danone, Siemens, y seguimos creciendo de manera exponencial: ¡únete a nosotros!

--




Los equipos de Joinrs

Joinrs está formada por varios equipos que trabajan tanto en remoto como en nuestras oficinas de Milán, Roma y Madrid.




Marketing

El equipo de Marketing lidera todas las actividades de comunicación estratégica de Joinrs, con el objetivo de aumentar la brand awareness y atraer nuevos usuarios y clientes, tanto B2C (estudiantes, recién graduados, perfiles junior) como B2B (empresas y partners). Se ocupa de campañas digitales, redes sociales, contenidos editoriales, PR y gestión de la comunidad. Dentro del equipo hay perfiles como Social Media Manager, Community Manager, Partnership Manager, Content Creator, Designer, Video Maker, Acquisition Specialist y PR Specialist.




Tech & Desarrollo

El equipo Tech es el corazón tecnológico de Joinrs: diseña, desarrolla y optimiza todas nuestras plataformas digitales y nuestra tecnología. Trabaja a diario en sistemas escalables, fáciles de usar y basados en inteligencia artificial. El equipo está formado por perfiles como Front-end Developer, Back-end Developer, Full-Stack Developer, AI Developer, Data Analyst, App Developer y Cybersecurity Specialist. El objetivo es garantizar rendimiento, innovación continua y máxima seguridad de los datos.




Business Development & Sales

Este equipo se encarga del crecimiento comercial de Joinrs, construyendo relaciones con empresas partners y ofreciendo soluciones personalizadas para employer branding y recruiting. Gestiona todo el ciclo de ventas: desde la identificación de leads hasta las llamadas iniciales, demos, propuestas comerciales y soporte postventa. Es un equipo clave para la expansión del negocio y la fidelización de clientes, tanto en Italia como en el extranjero.




Customer Success & Account Management

Este equipo se asegura de que cada cliente de Joinrs obtenga el máximo valor de los servicios contratados. Se ocupa del onboarding, del soporte continuo, de la gestión de ofertas de trabajo, del seguimiento de resultados y de identificar nuevas oportunidades de colaboración. Trabaja muy de cerca con Marketing, Sales y Tech para garantizar una experiencia fluida y personalizada.




Design

El equipo de Design es responsable de la identidad visual de Joinrs. Se encarga de todos los aspectos gráficos y creativos de la marca: desde la comunicación en redes sociales hasta la UI/UX de la plataforma, pasando por materiales para eventos y masterclass, o presentaciones corporativas. El objetivo es construir una imagen coherente, innovadora y reconocible, que conecte realmente con la Gen Z.




Recursos Humanos

El equipo de HR gestiona el crecimiento del equipo Joinrs y la gestión del talento, tanto interno como externo. Publica ofertas, organiza entrevistas y contrataciones, y además cuida la vida interna del equipo: contratos, onboarding, formación, actividades de team building y cultura organizacional. Su meta es crear un entorno de trabajo estimulante e inclusivo.




Finanzas, Inversores y Contabilidad

Este equipo gestiona la salud financiera de Joinrs. Se encarga del presupuesto, del control de gestión, de la elaboración de informes financieros, de la relación con inversores actuales y potenciales, del cumplimiento administrativo y de la contabilidad general. Es un área clave para sostener el crecimiento, planificar inversiones y garantizar la solidez económica a largo plazo.

--




Lo que te ofrecemos

Trabajar en el equipo de Joinrs significa poder elegir siempre las mejores condiciones psicofísicas para estar sereno y productivo. Esto se traduce en:




Trabajo remoto y flexibilidad. Tendrás la oportunidad de trabajar completamente a distancia todo el tiempo que desees, pero también apoyarte en una de nuestras oficinas.
Ambiente de trabajo dinámico. Nuestras oficinas siempre están abiertas. Te garantizamos espacios de trabajo compartidos, salas de reuniones, áreas de descanso y un bar con frutas frescas y aperitivos de todo tipo. También encontrarás una mesa de billar y una estación de juegos. Queremos un ambiente de trabajo informal que fomente momentos de compartir, siempre respetando las actividades individuales.
Team building y diversión. Organizamos a menudo aperitivos, juegos y momentos de recreo: son parte integral de la vida en Joinrs, tanto fuera como dentro de la oficina.
Bienestar empresarial. Te garantizamos un bienestar empresarial privado a la altura de tus expectativas.
Paquete tecnológico. Utilizarás software avanzado y tecnologías modernas, y se te proporcionará un MacBook de última generación.
Formación. Siempre contarás con un tutor en tu trayectoria en Joinrs: tendrás un punto de referencia tanto para los aspectos técnicos como para los del equipo. Te aseguramos un crecimiento profesional constante que se traducirá en un aumento progresivo de tus responsabilidades. Podrás participar en eventos del sector y cursos de formación, además de recibir formación continua en las mejores plataformas de aprendizaje en línea.
Impacto social. Tu contribución apoyará a miles de recién graduados a encontrar el trabajo al que aspiran: tendrás la oportunidad de interactuar con nuestra comunidad y descubrir el impacto social y la revolución que estamos llevando más allá de las fronteras italianas.

--




Contrato y Remuneración:

Para todas las posiciones ofrecemos un contrato de prácticas de 6 meses remuneradas con 1.000 € al mes (+ vales de comida, con posibilidad de contratación) o un contrato indefinido con un salario anual (RAL) entre 22.500 € y 27.500 €.

--




Proceso de selección:

1. Revisión del CV: el primer paso es una revisión del currículum (generalmente dentro de los 20 días posteriores a la solicitud).

2. Entrevista telefónica: el segundo paso incluirá una entrevista telefónica con nuestro Gerente de Recursos Humanos de aproximadamente 15 minutos.

3. Entrevista por video: el último paso será una entrevista por video con tanto el Gerente de Recursos Humanos como tu futuro supervisor. Prevemos al menos 45 minutos de entrevista.

--




¿Por qué unirte a nuestro equipo?

Impacto social: tendrás la oportunidad de apoyar a nuestra comunidad para que logren sus aspiraciones. Y las tuyas.

Startup exitosa: Joinrs fue seleccionada entre las 10 mejores startups del mundo en la Web Summit de Lisboa.

Crecimiento personal exponencial: tendrás la oportunidad de crecer de manera exponencial, tanto en habilidades técnicas como en habilidades blandas, gracias a un programa de formación basado en la capacitación en el trabajo y el apoyo en línea.

Title: Comercial
Description:
PORCELANOSA GRUPO

Descripción

En Porcelanosa Grupo contamos con más de 50 años de historia, estamos presentes en más de 140 países alrededor del mundo y somos una marca de referencia a nivel mundial en diseño y calidad de producto. Durante toda nuestra historia hemos estado siempre a la vanguardia de nuestro sector, especializándonos en la fabricación y comercialización de pavimentos y revestimientos cerámicos y naturales.

Nuestro reto siempre es mejorar, por eso queremos incorporar un@ comercial en nuestra delegación de Oviedo con experiencia ampliando cartera de clientes, así como fidelizar la actual para seguir creciendo y lograr que nuestra marca siga siendo un referente a nivel mundial.

Cuando formes parte de nuestro equipo contarás con una amplia gama de productos de las máximas calidades y de las tecnologías más innovadoras para ayudarte a conseguir tus objetivos. Te ayudaremos a materializar tus proyectos, siendo la confianza que depositamos en nuestros equipos uno de los aspectos más valorados por nuestra amplia plantilla.

Ofrecemos estabilidad, formación y un plan de carrera profesional que te permitirá desarrollar todo tu potencial, pero sobre todo, adquirimos un compromiso mutuo que nos ha ayudado a consolidar el éxito a lo largo de nuestra historia.

¿Quieres formar parte del equipo?

Requisitos Mínimos


Profesionales con experiencia en el trato al cliente y en la creación y consolidación de carteras de clientes.
Con buenas habilidades comunicativas y de negociación.
Experimentados/as en prescripción en el sector inmobiliario, promotoras e interiorismo.
Se valorará conocimientos de CRM, SAP y dominio de paquete Office.

Title: Administrativo/a
Description:
OFERTA DE EMPLEO – ADMINISTRATIVO/A OPERACIONES VTC

📍 Madrid

Continuamos creciendo y buscamos incorporar un/a Administrativo/a de Operaciones con experiencia y conocimientos sólidos en el sector VTC, orientado/a a la gestión operativa diaria, coordinación de conductores y control documental de flota.

Buscamos una persona organizada, resolutiva y con capacidad para desenvolverse en un entorno dinámico y exigente, acostumbrada a trabajar bajo objetivos y con gran capacidad de comunicación.

FUNCIONES PRINCIPALES


Gestión y seguimiento diario de conductores y flota VTC.
Control documental de vehículos, conductores, seguros, ITV, permisos y licencias.
Coordinación operativa de incidencias diarias.
Supervisión de cumplimiento de horarios, relevos y operativa de servicio.
Seguimiento de rendimiento operativo y productividad.
Gestión administrativa relacionada con plataformas VTC.
Atención telefónica y soporte operativo a conductores.
Elaboración de reportes e informes internos.
Coordinación con departamentos de operaciones, tráfico y recursos humanos.


REQUISITOS


Experiencia mínima de 2 años en empresas del sector VTC, movilidad o transporte.
Conocimiento real de la operativa diaria VTC en Madrid.
Manejo fluido de herramientas ofimáticas y Excel.
Capacidad organizativa y resolución de incidencias.
Buenas habilidades comunicativas y gestión de equipos.
Persona proactiva, responsable y con capacidad para trabajar bajo presión.
Valorable experiencia en gestión de flotas y plataformas de movilidad.


FORMACIÓN ACADÉMICA


Formación Profesional en Administración y Finanzas, Gestión Administrativa o similar.
Valorable formación complementaria en logística, transporte, operaciones o recursos humanos.


OFRECEMOS


Incorporación a una empresa en crecimiento y expansión.
Estabilidad laboral y desarrollo profesional.
Buen ambiente de trabajo y equipo dinámico.
Formación continua y posibilidad de crecimiento interno.
Jornada completa.
Salario según experiencia y perfil profesional.
Comedor a cargo de la empresa.


Si consideras que tienes experiencia en el sector VTC y quieres formar parte de un proyecto sólido y profesional, esperamos tu candidatura.

Title: Data & BI Analyst
Description:
Company Description

Inetum is a European leader in digital services. Inetum’s team of 28,000 consultants and specialists strive every day to make a digital impact for businesses, public sector entities and society. Inetum’s solutions aim at contributing to its clients’ performance and innovation as well as the common good. Present in 19 countries with a dense network of sites, Inetum partners with major software publishers to meet the challenges of digital transformation with proximity and flexibility. Driven by its ambition for growth and scale, Inetum generated sales of 2.5 billion euros in 2023.

Job Description


Creation of dashboards and reports to support decision-making.
Implementation of data visualization strategies.
Data Governance: asset cataloging, application of technical and functional rules.
Data Quality: execution of profiles and alerts for stakeholders.
Connections with Microsoft Fabric, Dynamics, and other sources.
Support to business teams in Purview, Data Governance, and Data Quality.
Onboarding and training


Qualifications


Between 2 and 5 years of experience in the role.
Experience in Data Governance and EDP projects.
Tools and platforms:
Microsoft Purview (implementation of data quality rules)
Microsoft Fabric
Power BI
Azure
Databricks
AWS
Languages and tools:
SQL
Advanced Excel
Dashboard tools
Desirable knowledge:
SAS Enterprise Guide
DOMO
DAMAn framework
Experience in CI/CD and agile methodologies.


Additional Information

Work model: Hybrid.

Job Description

Are you passionate about turning data into actionable insights? At Inetum, we are looking for a Business Data Analyst to bridge the gap between data and business, ensuring that information is available to support strategic decisions efficiently.

Key Responsibilities

  • Gather and define business requirements for data initiatives;
  • Extract and analyze data from commercial and analytical systems for ad hoc analysis;
  • Design and structure data models to create valuable products and ensure data consistency;
  • Perform business analysis to support operations and decision-making;
  • Communicate effectively with stakeholders and translate insights into actionable recommendations;
  • Contribute to the evolution of our Data Warehouse and Datahub.

Deliverables

  • Development of dashboards and data visualization strategies;
  • Creation of documents and reports to support decision-making;
  • Compilation of information and preparation of analytical reports;
  • User Stories for Data Warehouse enhancements;
  • Data modeling within the Data Warehouse;
  • Ad hoc data collection from commercial and analytical systems.

Qualifications

  • Up to 10 years of experience in similar roles;
  • Advanced knowledge of SQL for data extraction and manipulation;
  • Strong experience with dashboards and data visualization tools;
  • Advanced Excel and proficiency in Office tools;
  • Preferably experience with SAS Enterprise Guide and DOMO;
  • Solid understanding of data modeling and warehousing concepts.

Title: Data Analyst (Entry-Level / Early Career) - Lisbon
Description:
Unison is a telecom and renewables infrastructure investment firm funded in partnership with Ardian - the global investment house based in Paris with over $150 billion in assets under management. Unison commenced operations in 2003 and today invests in real estate and infrastructure hosting wireless and renewables tenants in the United States and Europe. The Company is expanding rapidly and looking for talented, entrepreneurial team members to grow with us.

Location: Lisbon, Portugal (on-site or hybrid)

Contract: Initial 6‑month contract with strong potential to become permanent

Salary: Competitive (aligned with Lisbon market)

About Unison

Unison is a telecom and renewable infrastructure investment firm, funded in partnership with Ardian, a leading global investment house headquartered in Paris with over $150 billion in assets under management.

Founded in 2003, Unison invests in real estate and infrastructure that support wireless networks and renewable energy across the United States and Europe. As part of our continued European expansion, we are growing our team in Lisbon and are looking for talented, motivated individuals to join us.

The Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and organised Data Researcher to support our UK market operations from Lisbon.

This opportunity is well suited to recent graduates, early-career professionals, career changers, or those returning to work. If you enjoy online research, working with structured data, and communicating clearly, this role offers a strong entry point into data-focused work. No technical or programming background is required, and full training will be provided.

Key Responsibilities

Research and validate information from public and online sources

Maintain and update structured datasets with accuracy and consistency

Communicate with UK-based external stakeholders via phone and email

Follow established processes and quality guidelines

Support the team in meeting regular targets and deadlines

What We’re Looking For

Fluent English (written and spoken) is essential

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Comfortable using computers and learning new tools quickly

Clear communication skills and professional approach

Well-organised, reliable, and proactive mindset

Positive attitude and willingness to learn

Nice to have:

Familiarity with the UK Land Registry system

Experience with GIS or mapping tools

French language skills are a plus given our European context

Who This Role Is Ideal For

Candidates with experience in customer service, administration, or market research

Individuals looking to transition into data or research roles

Entry-level candidates interested in data quality and analysis

What We Offer

Full onboarding and structured training

A supportive and collaborative international team environment

Exposure to UK and French market operations

Clear processes and expectations

A strong entry point into data and research roles within infrastructure investment

Opportunity to move into a permanent position

Eligibility

Applicants must have the right to live and work in Portugal

Candidates must be based in or willing to relocate to Lisbon

Ability to work in an English-speaking environment with UK stakeholders

How To Apply

Please submit a one-page CV and a short cover letter in English

Title: Data Analyst & Data Visualization Specialist
Description:
Company Description

Inetum is a global leader in IT services, dedicated to providing innovative solutions to our clients. We are committed to fostering a dynamic, inclusive workplace that values diversity, where creativity and collaboration thrive. We operate in 19 countries with more than 28,000 employees worldwide.

If you are looking for a dynamic, innovative, and technology-driven company, Inetum is the place for you! Come be Inetum!

Job Description

We are looking for a Data Analyst with strong skills in Data Science, ETL, and Data Visualization to support cybersecurity risk management activities.

The selected candidate will lead end‑to‑end dashboard projects, from gathering requirements to developing data models and delivering analytical insights. This role involves close collaboration with technical and business teams to transform data into meaningful, actionable information.

Main Responsibilities


Understand business requirements and define key KPIs related to cybersecurity risk management.
Collect, clean, and transform datasets using ETL tools to build effective data models.
Develop and maintain dashboards and reports, ensuring data accuracy and availability.
Use data processing and analysis platforms, applying statistical techniques when needed.
Leverage machine learning algorithms to uncover additional insights and identify correlations between indicators.
Present findings to stakeholders clearly, providing recommendations to improve dashboards and reporting.
Monitor data quality and continuously improve data models and processes.
Identify problems proactively and propose effective solutions.
Collaborate with team members across different locations to ensure smooth project execution.
Manage multiple projects simultaneously, demonstrating autonomy and strong time‑management skills.


Qualifications


A bachelor's degree in computer science, statistics, mathematics, or a related subject.
3+ years of experience as data Analyst, developing Dashboard and DataViz
Knowledge of algorithms is a plus and will enable the candidate to be a force for proposing useful content related to cyber security risk management.
Expertise with POWERBI, TABLEAU, DATAIKU, PostgreSQL and ETL tools (e.g., TABLEAU Certified Data Analyst, DATAIKU Advanced Designer Certificate)
Basic Python skills
English B2+

Title: Data Analyst Trainee - Real Assets
Description:
About The Job


Data is a strategic asset for BNP Paribas. It plays a fundamental role in the analysis of the teams’ performance and evolution ultimately allowing to become more efficient and to contribute to the sustainability of the business model and the accurate selection of the bank’s assets. To be in control of data is crucial to enhance risk management, to reach right credit decisions and bring added value to the business
Based in Lisbon, the Trainee will join a team of professionals who are known for their sectorial knowledge and support the team


Your Main Activities Are


Input missing data on credit files for presentation to the Credit Committee
Ensure accuracy of credit data
Ensure consistency of data between different credit files
Communicate with the CPM Credit Analyst Teams aiming to get updates on progress of credit files
Ensure proper understanding of credit files to identify structured data to be inputted
Create and maintain standard procedures for data input (user guides)
Cooperate and communicate with the teams in charge of the golden source systems to ensure correct data in the source system
Produce periodic reports based on data collected and captured, providing clear analysis and interpretation


Profile And Skills To Success


Bachelor’s Degree in Economics, Accounting or Management
Detail oriented with deep interest in data
Good knowledge of Excel
Good written/verbal communication skills in English (mandatory)
Ability to collaborate / teamwork
Efficient organizational and planning capacities
Self-starter, good initiative and flexible


About The Team


The Real Assets team includes a Coverage Relationship & Origination team, a Transaction & Execution team and a Credit Portfolio Management Team (CPM) spread across several countries serving the sector client in EMEA. These teams are split across Transportation (Shipping & Offshore, Aviation, Rail), Real Estate, Energy, Recourses & Infrastructure (ERI), Export, Leasing & Alternative Structuring. This transversality aims to provide a common training path, opportunities to explore other sectors, more efficiency and greater mobility


Why joining BNP Paribas?


Leading banking institution


BNP Paribas is the European Union’s leading bank, and key player in international banking. It operates in 63 countries and has nearly 183.000 employees, including more than 146.000 in Europe.


Our presence in Portugal


In Portugal since 1985, BNP Paribas today has more than 8.700 employees, distributed across the Group's 10 business entities established in the country. Its presence also extends to 11 excellence centers providing value-added services to various countries where the BNP Paribas Group also operates.


International reach


Thanks To Its International Presence And Regular And Close Collaboration Among Its Different Entities, BNP Paribas Has The Resources To Support All Clients With Financing, Investment, Savings And Protection Solutions That Help Make Their Projects a Success. BNP Paribas Holds Key Positions In Its Three Core Operating Divisions


Retail Banking, a division that brings together all of the Group’s retail activities and specialised business lines;
Investment & Protection Services that include specialised businesses offering a wide range of savings, investment and protection services;
Corporate & Institutional Banking division that offers tailored financial solutions for corporate and institutional clients.
Diversity and Inclusion commitment


BNP Paribas is an equal opportunity employer and proud to provide equal employment opportunity to all job seekers. We are actively committed to ensuring that no individual is discriminated against on the grounds of age, disability, gender reassignment, marriage or civil partnership status, pregnancy and maternity/paternity, race, religion or belief, sex or sexual orientation. Equity and diversity are at the core of our recruitment policy because we believe that they foster creativity and efficiency, which in turn increase performance and productivity. We strive to reflect the society we live in, while keeping with the image of our clients.


Commitment towards work/life balance


At BNP Paribas we care about our employees wellbeing and promote a culture of good integration between work and rest. We believe our employees have rich personal lives outside of work, being fundamental to be disconnected from work to recharge both physically and mentally. Only through this balance we may all be at our best while working.


Remote Working Conditions


At BNP Paribas, we embrace a Smart Working framework based on trust, autonomy and collaboration. Within this framework, eligible employees can benefit from flexible remote working modalities adapted to our hybrid working environment. To guarantee a comfortable and efficient working set-up, eligible employees are provided with both the office and home equipment, are entitled to an equipment allowance and can benefit from exclusive partnerships to purchase additional equipment at reduced prices.

To find out more on why you should join BNP Paribas visit https://bnpp.lk/why-BNP-Paribas-Portugal


Please note that only applications submitted in English will be considered.
In case you are selected for this role, further documentation will be requested to support your hiring process.

BNP Paribas is the European Union’s leading bank, and key player in international banking. It operates in 63 countries and has nearly 183.000 employees, including more than 146.000 in Europe.

  • Our presence in Portugal

In Portugal since 1985, BNP Paribas today has more than 8.700 employees, distributed across the Group's 10 business entities established in the country. Its presence also extends to 11 excellence centers providing value-added services to various countries where the BNP Paribas Group also operates.

  • International reach

Thanks To Its International Presence And Regular And Close Collaboration Among Its Different Entities, BNP Paribas Has The Resources To Support All Clients With Financing, Investment, Savings And Protection Solutions That Help Make Their Projects a Success. BNP Paribas Holds Key Positions In Its Three Core Operating Divisions

  • Retail Banking, a division that brings together all of the Group’s retail activities and specialised business lines;
  • Investment & Protection Services that include specialised businesses offering a wide range of savings, investment and protection services;
  • Corporate & Institutional Banking division that offers tailored financial solutions for corporate and institutional clients.
  • Diversity and Inclusion commitment

BNP Paribas is an equal opportunity employer and proud to provide equal employment opportunity to all job seekers. We are actively committed to ensuring that no individual is discriminated against on the grounds of age, disability, gender reassignment, marriage or civil partnership status, pregnancy and maternity/paternity, race, religion or belief, sex or sexual orientation. Equity and diversity are at the core of our recruitment policy because we believe that they foster creativity and efficiency, which in turn increase performance and productivity. We strive to reflect the society we live in, while keeping with the image of our clients.

  • Commitment towards work/life balance

At BNP Paribas we care about our employees wellbeing and promote a culture of good integration between work and rest. We believe our employees have rich personal lives outside of work, being fundamental to be disconnected from work to recharge both physically and mentally. Only through this balance we may all be at our best while working.

  • Remote Working Conditions

At BNP Paribas, we embrace a Smart Working framework based on trust, autonomy and collaboration. Within this framework, eligible employees can benefit from flexible remote working modalities adapted to our hybrid working environment. To guarantee a comfortable and efficient working set-up, eligible employees are provided with both the office and home equipment, are entitled to an equipment allowance and can benefit from exclusive partnerships to purchase additional equipment at reduced prices.

To find out more on why you should join BNP Paribas visit https://bnpp.lk/why-BNP-Paribas-Portugal

  • Please note that only applications submitted in English will be considered.
  • In case you are selected for this role, further documentation will be requested to support your hiring process.

Title: Senior Data Analyst - CRM (m/f/d)
Description:
At Flix, we offer a dynamic work environment with competitive pay, strong growth opportunities, and a tech-driven approach to making travel more accessible, sustainable, and affordable. 

As a Senior Data Analyst (m/f/d), you will join our global CRM team. This is an important role for CRM at Flix as we expand our capabilities, redefine our communication strategy and constantly optimize for maximum growth, as well as scalability and efficiency. We support global market growth with our marketing activities to increase repeated purchases and prevent churn. We always aim for cutting-edge technologies and a high level of innovation. By joining our team, you will be a crucial part of driving the team forward, developing our brands and customer communication throughout the globe.

About The Role


Own CRM analytics and reporting across 45+ markets, delivering clear visibility into performance, customer behavior, and commercial impact
Build and maintain Power BI dashboards providing real-time tracking of CRM performance, targets, and business trends
Deliver actionable insights on campaign performance, drivers of customer behavior, value-generating segments, and cross-market differences
Develop scalable, automated reporting solutions alongside deep-dive analyses and ad hoc business investigations
Monitor and optimize key CRM KPIs (engagement, conversion, retention, reactivation, communication effectiveness) and customer lifecycle performance
Partner with CRM, data, and product teams to improve segmentation, personalization, experimentation, tracking quality, and data reliability
Evaluate A/B tests and proactively identify trends, anomalies, risks, and opportunities, presenting clear recommendations to senior stakeholders


About You


5+ years of experience in data analytics or BI, ideally within CRM, marketing, or e-commerce environments
Proven track record of building dashboards and automated reporting solutions for non-technical stakeholders
Strong SQL expertise (CTEs, window functions, multi-table joins) in a modern cloud data warehouse, preferably Snowflake
Advanced Power BI skills including data modeling, DAX, and best-practice dashboard design and visualization
Solid understanding of marketing and CRM KPIs (conversion, engagement, attribution, customer lifetime value)
Experience working cross-functionally with product, engineering, and marketing/CRM teams; familiarity with marketing automation tools (e.g., Braze is a plus)
Strong data storytelling, statistical literacy (e.g., significance testing), and a structured, detail-oriented, and autonomous working style
Proficiency in English


We recognize that everyone carries a unique set of valuable skills and experiences. If you think you could have an impact even though you don't meet 100% of the requirements, we still encourage you to apply. We want to hear from you! 

What We Offer


Travel perks: 12 free Flix vouchers + 12 discount vouchers for friends & family.
Work from (M)Anywhere: Depending on your role, work from another location for up to 60 days per year.
Hybrid work model: We are an office-first company, but we offer flexibility to balance work and life.
Wellbeing support: Access confidential 1:1 counselling, courses, and stress management for yourself and up to four family members.
Learning & Development: Take advantage of language classes, training courses, and expert-led sessions to grow your skills.
Mentoring Program: Connect with experienced colleagues to gain insights and accelerate your career.


To view more local benefits specific to each office location, please check out this link: Locations - Flix Career

Why Join Flix?

At Flix, you’ll find teams that rally together to overcome challenges and spark creativity. We believe in ownership culture - giving you the freedom to take initiative, make an impact, and shape your own career path.

As we continue to expand across the globe, you can make a real difference in how we work.

If you’re ready to grow and lead your journey, Flix is the place for you!

Title: Business Intelligence Consultant (Power BI)
Description:
Descrição da empresa

Inetum is a European leader in digital services. Inetum’s team of 28,000 consultants and specialists strive every day to make a digital impact for businesses, public sector entities and society. Inetum’s solutions aim at contributing to its clients’ performance and innovation as well as the common good. Present in 19 countries with a dense network of sites, Inetum partners with major software publishers to meet the challenges of digital transformation with proximity and flexibility. Driven by its ambition for growth and scale, Inetum generated sales of 2.5 billion euros in 2023.

Descrição do emprego

📌 About the Role

We are looking for a Business Intelligence Consultant (Power BI) with proven experience in implementing BI solutions. This professional will be responsible for transforming data into actionable insights, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and supporting strategic decision-making for our clients.

🛠️ Responsibilities


Design and develop interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI
Participate in business requirements analysis and stakeholder engagement
Model data and build efficient, scalable BI solutions
Ensure data quality, consistency, and security across all deliverables
Collaborate with technical and functional teams to deliver value to the client


Qualificações

🎯 Technical Requirements


Minimum of 3 years of experience in BI projects using Power BI
Strong command of DAX, Power Query, and data modeling
Experience with relational databases (e.g., SQL Server, Azure SQL)
Knowledge of Azure Data Services (e.g., Data Factory, Synapse) is a plus
Microsoft certifications are preferred (e.g., Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate and/or Microsoft Fabric)
Fluency in Portuguese and a good level of technical English


🌟 Valued Soft Skills


Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Analytical thinking and problem-solving orientation
Proactive and able to work independently
Adaptability to different contexts and client environments
Team spirit and collaborative mindset


Informação adicional

🎁 What We Offer


Involvement in challenging and innovative projects
Opportunities for professional growth and career development
Access to continuous training and Microsoft certifications
A collaborative, results-driven work environment

Title: Data Analyst - Operational and Permanent Control - Lisbon or Porto
Description:
About The Job

The Operational and Permanent Control (OPC) Data Analyst plays a key role in Global Banking Chief Conduct and Control Officer (GB CCCO) Office Front-to-Ops missions and worldwide mandate to support on the identification and assessment of non-financial risks. It ensures the enforcement and efficiency of the control framework and to promote an adequate risk management culture.

Your Main Activities Are


Data monitoring and report through the creation of business-facing dashboards and high impact data visualizations and analysis
Understand the stakeholders strategic needs
Create descriptive, predictive, and quantitative analyses addressing key business priorities and supporting the decision making
Support and monitor the run of these activities of data analysis, reporting and data mining
Supporting on the analysis of risk identification and assessment ensuring its validation by the relevant management level and consistency with the defined risk tolerance
Monitor and Report Recommendations, Permanent Control Actions, Self-identified action plans and follow-up of remediation plans
Centralize and automate reports production, gathering major operational risks indicators (automated KPI and KRI dashboards)
Automate relevant sampling creation, control execution and reporting
Perform periodic and ad-hoc reporting to the appropriate level of management and to independent control functions
Show ability to take ownership of specific OPC activity streams and topics being able to deliver the full and exhaustive actions taken
Whenever needed, support on management of procedures, control execution, incidents monitoring and any other CCCO GB related tasks
Provide visibility on performance and activities of CCCO GB within the team or any other stakeholder


Profile and Skills to Success


Bachelor's or Master´s Degree in Engineering, Data Analytics, or Finance related fields
Fluency in English
Up to 2 years of experience in data analytics
Experience using Microsoft Office Tools, particularly Excel
Proficiency in Power BI, SQL
Attention to detail and creative thinking
Ability to synthetize
Ability to deliver results


Why joining BNP Paribas?


Leading banking institution


Leading player in banking and financial services in Europe, BNP Paribas operates in 64 countries and has nearly 178,000 employees, including more than 144,000 in Europe


International reach


The Group holds key positions in several areas of banking and financial services that are structured around three operating divisions:


Corporate & Institutional Banking (CIB) connects companies needing financing and institutional clients looking for investment opportunities division that offers tailored financial solutions for corporate and institutional clients
Commercial, Personal Banking & Services (CPBS) brings together all our commercial banks and several specialised businesses heard
Investment & Protection Services (IPS) combines a unique continuum of products and services across protection, saving, investment and real estate including specialised businesses offering a wide range of savings, investment and protection services
Our presence in Portugal


In Portugal since 1985, BNP Paribas today has more than 9.220 employees, distributed across the Group's 10 business entities established in the country. Its presence also extends to 11 centres of expertise providing value-added services to various countries where the BNP Paribas Group also operates.


Diversity and Inclusion commitment


BNP Paribas ´ambition Is To Cultivate An Open And Responsive Environment For All That Encourages Collaboration And Interaction. We Demonstrate Our Commitment By Actively Contributing To The Group’s Diversity And Inclusion Strategy And Goals, In Line With The United Nations Sustainable Development Goals. As Part Of Our Local Corporate And Social Responsibility – Diversity & Inclusion Strategy, BNP Paribas Portugal Is Committed To


Promote a fair and unbiased recruitment process and offer professional development opportunities to all employees
Celebrate diversity and advocate for inclusion, both externally and internally, encouraging employee’s participation, creating space for different voices to be heard.


To foster the effort of BNP Paribas Portugal, multiple initiatives and events take place throughout the year where our people can find out more on the importance of diversity inclusion at the workplace and in our society.


Remote Working Conditions


At BNP Paribas, we embrace a Smart Working framework based on trust, autonomy and collaboration. Within this framework, eligible employees can benefit from flexible remote working options adapted to our hybrid working environment. To ensure a comfortable and efficient working setup, eligible employees are provided with both office and home equipment, are entitled to an equipment allowance and can benefit from exclusive partnerships to purchase additional items at reduced prices.


Commitment towards work/life balance


Supporting employees in a hybrid way of working while providing them with the means to maintain a work-life balance is an essential dimension of our Smart Working program. At BNP Paribas, we care about our employees’ wellbeing and promote a culture of good integration between work and personal life.

To find out more on why you should join BNP Paribas please read our Employee Value Proposition and our Career path page.


Please note that only applications submitted in English will be considered.
In case you are selected for this role, further documentation will be requested to support your hiring process.

Title: Business Analyst (Data & BI) - Associate
Description:
Company Description

Our vision is to be the world leader in sports betting and gaming entertainment by creating the most exciting and trusted experience for our customers, revolutionizing the gambling space as we go. We're home to a global family of >25 well-known brands, and with a focus on sustainability and growth, we will transform our sector for our players, ourselves and for the good of entertainment.

This role sits at the core of our Data & BI function, translating data into actionable insights for stakeholders. The Associate Business Analyst will work closely with business teams to understand their needs, extract and analyse data and deliver clear, impactful outputs through dashboards, reporting, and ad-hoc analysis.

The position combines technical data skills with strong business understanding, requiring the ability not only to produce data, but to interpret it, challenge assumptions, and drive meaningful outcomes.

This is the ideal opportunity for someone with a passion for sports to develop their analytical and reporting skills within a fast-paced and competitive environment.

Job Description


Extract, manipulate, and analyse large datasets from Snowflake using SQL, turning data into clear, actionable insights - not just outputs.
Build and maintain dashboards and reporting solutions, ensuring they are scalable, reliable, and widely adopted by the business.
Translate business questions into structured analysis, delivering concise and impactful insights to stakeholders.
Deliver ad-hoc analysis to support decision-making across multiple business areas, with a strong focus on speed and accuracy.
Contribute to the development and maintenance of self-serve analytics, enabling teams to independently access and explore data.
Work closely with Data Engineering and other teams to improve data availability, quality, and usability.
Continuously challenge assumptions, identify opportunities, and proactively propose data-driven solutions to business problems.


Qualifications

Essential:


A degree in Statistics, Economics, Mathematics, Computer Science or related field.
2+ years’ experience with SQL and data analysis.
Proficiency in Excel.
Working knowledge of SQL, with the ability to query and manipulate large datasets.
Fluent level of written and spoken English.
An understanding of statistical analysis techniques.


Desired


Advanced SQL skills
Interest in sports and/or familiarity with the sports betting / iGaming industry
Experience with dbt and GIT
Experience with tools such as Google Analytics, Optimove, or similar marketing/data platforms
Experience with BI and data visualization tools (e.g. Omni, Looker, Power BI, Tableau)
Experience working in digital, data-driven, or iGaming environments
Portuguese and/or Spanish


Competencies/Behaviours

Additional Information


Team player.
Strong interpersonal skills.
Proactivity, hands on approach
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Excellent attention to detail.
Ability to analyse large amounts of data quickly and accurately.
Relentless curiosity: Questions the status quo, continually asks why/why not.
Focused on achieving targets and meeting deadlines.
Takes initiative and can work autonomously.

Title: Analista de dados
Description:
Na Axians, valorizamos o talento, não os rótulos.

Acreditamos numa cultura de inclusão, onde todas as pessoas têm lugar e todas as candidaturas serão consideradas com base no mérito, sem discriminação.

Esta é a tua oportunidade de integrares um grupo internacional, com um projeto que precisa de ti para responder aos desafios da transformação digital.

💻 O CARGO

Procuramos um #TechTalent para desempenhar funções enquanto Analista de Dados para um projeto no setor da saúde.

💡O TEU DIA A DIA


Análise e transformação de dados - Integração, tratamento e transformação de dados para suporte à área de Data Analytics, com foco na criação de relatórios e dashboards
Desenvolvimento e melhoria de relatórios - Criação, manutenção e otimização de relatórios nas áreas de Logística e RH, incluindo melhorias de performance, automatizações e evolução de soluções já existentes.
Suporte à transformação e automatização de processos - Colaboração em iniciativas de melhoria contínua, automatização de reporting e suporte às necessidades do negócio.


O QUE PROCURAMOS


Experiência prévia de pelo menos 3 anos em análise de dados
Conhecimento sólido de SQL, Python e Alteryx
Licença de Alteryx (obrigatório)


⭐ O QUE PODES ESPERAR DE NÓS

Carreira profissional estável

Ao trabalhar com projetos da Axians torna-se uma mais valia a quem queremos oferecer estabilidade, através de uma carreira segura.

Perspetivas de progressão na carreira

Poderá aceder a formações e novas certificações que elevarão ainda mais as suas competências. A avaliação 360° dos managers e peers também permitirão evoluir.

Conciliação entre a área profissional e a familiar

Colaborando com a Axians há abertura para conciliar as exigências laborais com os requisitos familiares, evitando negligenciar cada uma das áreas.

Compensação evolutiva e atrativa

Ao trabalhar com clientes da Axians, terá acesso a prémios de performance, além de um pack salarial atrativo (vencimento base + benefícios). Também tem direito a seguro de saúde e consultas de psicologia gratuitas.

Identifica-se com esta vaga?

Se pensa que esta vaga é a sua cara e tem o #TechTalent que procuramos envie-nos o seu currículo, de preferência em inglês e em formato Europass, para recrutamento.axianspt@axians.comcom o subject "AD.SA.TD".

Saber mais sobre a Axians

💻 O CARGO

Procuramos um #TechTalent para desempenhar funções enquanto Analista de Dados para um projeto no setor da saúde.

💡O TEU DIA A DIA

  • Análise e transformação de dados - Integração, tratamento e transformação de dados para suporte à área de Data Analytics, com foco na criação de relatórios e dashboards
  • Desenvolvimento e melhoria de relatórios - Criação, manutenção e otimização de relatórios nas áreas de Logística e RH, incluindo melhorias de performance, automatizações e evolução de soluções já existentes.
  • Suporte à transformação e automatização de processos - Colaboração em iniciativas de melhoria contínua, automatização de reporting e suporte às necessidades do negócio.

O QUE PROCURAMOS

  • Experiência prévia de pelo menos 3 anos em análise de dados
  • Conhecimento sólido de SQL, Python e Alteryx
  • Licença de Alteryx (obrigatório)

⭐ O QUE PODES ESPERAR DE NÓS

Carreira profissional estável

Ao trabalhar com projetos da Axians torna-se uma mais valia a quem queremos oferecer estabilidade, através de uma carreira segura.

Perspetivas de progressão na carreira

Poderá aceder a formações e novas certificações que elevarão ainda mais as suas competências. A avaliação 360° dos managers e peers também permitirão evoluir.

Conciliação entre a área profissional e a familiar

Colaborando com a Axians há abertura para conciliar as exigências laborais com os requisitos familiares, evitando negligenciar cada uma das áreas.

Compensação evolutiva e atrativa

Ao trabalhar com clientes da Axians, terá acesso a prémios de performance, além de um pack salarial atrativo (vencimento base + benefícios). Também tem direito a seguro de saúde e consultas de psicologia gratuitas.

Title: Data and Reporting Analyst Trainee
Description:
About The Job


A Data/Reporting Analyst Trainee supports the management of Group Learning & Development (L&D) team, in all topics requiring transversal coordination or consolidation of information. The trainee provides support to management processes, such as planning and/or monitoring the execution of any type of activity, such as a project or a process, being accountable for a wide variety of tasks requiring transversal coordination or consolidation and impacting the business


Your Main Activities Are


Understand the needs expressed by HR teams and the business
Contribute to monitor and analyse of HR data by creating KPIs, updating and creating reports/dashboards
Assess and ensure control to monitor the data quality
Develop, maintain, and update standard operating procedures (SOPs) for data handling, reporting, and dashboard governance
Clearly communicate actionable recommendations orally and in writing through reliable and quality deliverable


Profile And Skills To Success


Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Management or Economics
Knowledge in Tableau and Power BI
Knowledge in Microsoft Office Pack (namely Excel, PowerPoint, and Teams)
Knowledge of Data Quality
Fluent in English, both spoken and written
Teamwork and collaboration
Good communication skills
Good organizational skills
Rigor and attention to detail
Analytical ability
Problem-solving skills
Able to deliver and results driven


Why joining BNP Paribas?

BNP Paribas, The European Leader In Banking And Financial Services In Europe, Operates In 64 Countries And Has Nearly 180,000 Employees. The Group Is Structured Around Three Operating Divisions. Its Business Lines Cooperate Closely, As Part Of Our Integrated Model, To Meet The Needs Of All Our Clients In a Coordinated Manner


Corporate & Institutional Banking (CIB), connects corporate clients needing financing and institutional clients looking for investment opportunities;
Commercial, Personal Banking & Services (CPBS), brings together all the Group’s commercial & personal banking and several specialised businesses;
Investment & Protection Services (IPS), combines a unique continuum of products and services across protection, saving, investment and real-estate.


Our presence in Portugal

In Portugal since 1985, BNP Paribas today has more than 9.700 employees, distributed across the Group's 10 business entities established in the country. Its presence also extends to 11 excellence centres providing value-added services to various countries where the BNP Paribas Group also operates.

Diversity and Inclusion Commitment

BNP Paribas´ Ambition Is To Cultivate An Open And Responsive Environment For All That Encourages Collaboration And Interaction. We Demonstrate Our Commitment By Actively Contributing To The Group’s Diversity And Inclusion Strategy And Goals, In Line With The United Nations Sustainable Development Goals. As Part Of Our Local Corporate And Social Responsibility - Diversity & Inclusion Strategy, BNP Paribas Portugal Is Committed To


Promote a fair and unbiased recruitment process and offer professional development opportunities to all employees;
Celebrate diversity and advocate for inclusion, both externally and internally, encouraging employee’s participation, creating space for different voices to be heard.


To foster the effort of BNP Paribas Portugal, multiple initiatives and events take place throughout the year where our people can find out more on the importance of diversity inclusion at the workplace and in our society.

Remote Working Conditions

At BNP Paribas, we embrace a Smart Working framework based on trust, autonomy and collaboration. Within this framework, eligible employees can benefit from flexible remote working options adapted to our hybrid working environment. To ensure a comfortable and efficient working setup, eligible employees are provided with both office and home equipment, are entitled to an equipment allowance and can benefit from exclusive partnerships to purchase additional items at reduced prices.

Commitment towards work/life balance

Supporting employees in a hybrid way of working while providing them with the means to maintain a work-life balance is an essential dimension of our Smart Working program. At BNP Paribas, we care about our employees’ wellbeing and promote a culture of good integration between work and personal life.

To find out more on why you should join BNP Paribas please read our Employee Value Proposition and our Career path page.


Please note that only applications submitted in English will be considered.
In case you are selected for this role, further documentation will be requested to support your hiring process.

Title: Senior Data Analyst (CX)
Description:
Department: CX Analytics

Employment Type: Full Time

Location: Remote/Portugal

Reporting To: Maxim Manzyuk

Description

As a Customer Experience (CX) Data Analyst, you will play a key role in improving how we support our customers through data driven insights and operational analytics. You will work closely with CX, product, and operations teams to measure performance, identify improvement opportunities, and support better decision making across support workflows.

This role focuses on analytics, reporting, and process optimization, with exposure to automation and AI powered tools as part of everyday analytical work.

Key Responsibilities

Data Analysis & Insights


Analyze large-scale datasets related to agent performance, support interactions and QA.
Write optimized SQL queries using tools like BigQuery and ClickHouse.
Build dashboards in Tableau, Metabase.
Detect behavioral and performance trends among agents and support teams.
Partner with QA to identify root causes in agent behavior and customer issues.



LLM & Prompting


Use LLM tools with practical prompt engineering for daily analytical tasks, summarization, and insights generation.
Ability to assess and profile LLM outputs for quality, relevance, and analytical correctness in business contexts.
Familiarity with LLM APIs and integrating model outputs into analytical or internal tooling workflows.



Automation & Workflow Optimization


Work with Airflow and Python to automate data tasks and support workflows.
Optimize analytics pipelines and data marts to improve performance, resource efficiency, and reliability.
Identify and refactor inefficient DAGs, queries, and transformations to ensure scalable and cost-effective data processing.
Suggest and co-build improvements in agent tooling, ticket routing, and SLA tracking.
Translate business inefficiencies into trackable metrics and measurable outcomes.



Cross-Functional Collaboration


Act as an analytical partner to Operations, Support Management, QA, and Training.
Work with Data Engineering to ensure clean, accurate, and well-modeled data pipelines.
Communicate findings clearly through presentations, visualizations, and concise documentation.



Skills, Knowledge & Expertise


3+ years of experience as a data analyst in a fast-paced, data-heavy environment.
Advanced SQL skills (preferably in BigQuery and/or ClickHouse).
Proficiency in Python for data analysis, automation, and integration tasks.
Experience with data visualization tools (e.g. Tableau, Metabase, Looker).
Understanding of Airflow, DAG orchestration, and modern data pipelines.
Experience with LLM agents, prompt engineering, and API usage.
Ability to translate business questions into structured, testable hypotheses.
Strong presentation and storytelling skills; able to communicate with technical and non-technical stakeholders alike.
Upper-Intermediate or higher English proficiency (spoken and written).



Job Benefits


We are an international Team of inspired professionals located all over the globe.
We have an inclusive company culture, embracing diversity, integrity and transparency. We strive for work-life balance and cherish the moments you spend with your loved ones, off-work. In the same spirit as for our product, we are caring and nurturing for our employees.
Our people are granted 100% trust and freedom to apply their own vision and come up with their ideas from day 1 at Tabby. You are the one who takes responsibility for your area of work. We encourage everyone to think and make decisions like Tabby was their own business, well because it is. Our employee stock options programme is available for everyone.
You will have an opportunity to learn and grow in one of the fastest growing fin tech companies in the region
We offer you relocation support as well as we guide you through all the process.
We’ll set you up with the devices required for your work.
