Title: AI Trainer - Freelance Data Annotator
Description:
Please submit your resume in English and indicate your level of English.

At Toloka, we connect smart, curious people from around the world with freelance online tasks that train and improve artificial intelligence.

What We Do

The Toloka Annotators connects individuals with Generative AI projects from leading tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the full potential of AI by involving real people from around the world in the development process.

About The Role

Annotation is what helps AI make sense of the world. As an annotator, you may be invited to take part in online projects such as rating AI-generated content, evaluating factual accuracy, or comparing responses - when projects are available.

Responsibilities:


Carefully review provided data (text, images, or videos)
Label or classify content based on project guidelines
Identify and flag factually incorrect, sensitive, inappropriate, or unclear material


Important note: This is project-based work. Tasks are available only when projects are active. You may be invited to one or more projects depending on your profile and current opportunities.

Each project has its own compensation level based on scope and expertise required. On this project, AI trainers earn up to $17 per hour equivalent.

Requirements


Bachelor's degree in any discipline
Minimum 1 year of experience in any professional role
Advanced level of English (C1 or higher), both written and spoken
Logical thinking, fact-checking and reasoning abilities
Strong attention to detail and ability to understand and follow complex instructions
Strong communication skills, including the ability to ask clarifying questions when needed
Genuine interest in technology and artificial intelligence


Benefits

Why this freelance opportunity might be a great fit for you?


Take part in a part-time, remote, freelance project that fits around your primary professional or academic commitments
Work on advanced AI projects and gain valuable experience that enhances your portfolio
Influence how future AI models understand and communicate in your field of expertise

  • Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or Scala;
  • Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases;
  • Experience with Big Data technologies such as Databricks, Hadoop, Apache Spark, Kafka;
  • Availability for a hybrid regime at Porto (Portugal);
  • Fluency in English is mandatory.


To turn yourself from amazing to unique, you´ll have (plus):

  • French AND/OR Portuguese fluency.



Why should you become part of our family?

  • You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
  • Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
  • Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
  • International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
  • Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
  • In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
  • Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
  • Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
  • Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psicologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!


Who are we?


Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

Title: Reporting and Business Intelligence Senior Specialist (f/m/div)
Description:
#WeAreIn for jobs that impact everyone’s life Behind every success, there is a plan: your strategic thinking, creative skills, and ability to communicate with others will drive innovation and turn ideas into impact. As a Reporting and Business Intelligence Senior Specialist on our Corporate team, you’ll play a vital part in building the frameworks, relationships, and processes that keep Infineon’s Business thriving. Are you in?

Your Role

Key responsibilities in your new role

As a Reporting and BI Senior Specialist, you will provide user support, training, and analysis for IFX reporting solutions, manage change requests, implement new reporting tools, and analyze data to drive business insights and improvements.


Act as a Solution Owner for one or more global reporting solutions, with a focus on providing dedicated support to a specific region, ensuring seamless solution delivery, and driving business value through data-driven insights
Be responsible for the Change Request management including documentation of the corresponding requirements
Design and create standard reports/dashboards for the respective functions and functional areas and develop the reporting solutions with own ideas
Collaborate with functional users to analyze and define reporting requirements
Analyze data and business processes in the respective functional area to identify opportunities for improvement and optimization
Create training concepts and implement of training for the respective reporting solutions
Develop the reporting landscape through the application of Smart Data methods (e.g. Big Data, Artificial Intelligence, Industrial Analytics) with the aim of enabling rapid learning, decision-making and increased productivity


Your Profile

Qualifications And Skills To Help You Succeed

Results-driven professional with strong communication, analytical skills, and a customer-focused mindset. Excels in fast-paced environments, simplifies complex concepts, and drives business success through data insights and independent ownership.


A degree in Business Administration, Economics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field
At least 3 years of experience in a data science role, ideally from a business point of view
Experience in working with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Denodo, or similar alternative tools
Proven experience in delivering training sessions to diverse audiences
Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Fluency in English is mandatory


Please send us your CV in English.

Contact:

Luis Oliveira, LinkedIn

#WeAreIn for driving decarbonization and digitalization.

As a global leader in semiconductor solutions in power systems and IoT, Infineon enables game-changing solutions for green and efficient energy, clean and safe mobility, as well as smart and secure IoT. Together, we drive innovation and customer success, while caring for our people and empowering them to reach ambitious goals. Be a part of making life easier, safer and greener.

Are you in?

We are on a journey to create the best Infineon for everyone.

This means we embrace diversity and inclusion and welcome everyone for who they are. At Infineon, we offer a working environment characterized by trust, openness, respect and tolerance and are committed to give all applicants and employees equal opportunities. We base our recruiting decisions on the applicant´s experience and skills. Learn more about our various contact channels.

We look forward to receiving your resume, even if you do not entirely meet all the requirements of the job posting.

Please let your recruiter know if they need to pay special attention to something in order to enable your participation in the interview process.

Click here for more information about Diversity & Inclusion at Infineon.

Title: Developer & Data Process Engineer (Entry-level)
Description:
Voxelmaps is seeking to hire a hybrid Developer & Data Process Engineer to support both our Research & Development and data processing operations teams. This is a full-time, permanent role with an immediate start date.

This position blends full stack application development with data pipeline and cloud infrastructure work, focusing on building scalable web platforms while supporting the processing, transformation, and validation of large datasets generated from mapping systems.

You must live in PORTO, PORTUGAL or be willing to relocate, as this is an office-based role.

What You’ll Do


Design, develop, and maintain modern .NET-based web applications and APIs
Build and support data processing pipelines for large-scale mapping datasets
Work with cloud infrastructure (AWS) to support application and data workflows
Develop and maintain frontend components using modern JavaScript frameworks
Execute, monitor, and troubleshoot data processing workflows
Write and maintain automation scripts (Bash/Python)
Manage and deploy services using containerized environments
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions
Debug, test, and optimize both application code and data pipelines
Ensure system performance, reliability, and scalability



What We Expect


Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Ability to work both independently and collaboratively
Ownership mindset with consistent delivery of results
Ability to manage a mix of development, infrastructure, and data tasks
Strong communication skills and ability to follow structured workflows



Required Experience

> Application Development:


Strong experience with C# and .NET / .NET Core / ASP.NET Core
Experience building REST APIs and backend systems
Frontend development experience with JavaScript / TypeScript and React
Solid knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design
Strong SQL experience (SQL Server, MySQL, or PostgreSQL)



> Systems, Cloud & Data:


Strong experience with Linux (Ubuntu 22.04 / 24.04)
Experience working with AWS, specifically:
EC2 (compute instances)
S3 (storage and data handling)
Experience using GitLab for version control and collaboration
Strong experience writing Bash scripts for automation
Experience using SSH for remote system access and management
Experience working with Docker (containers, images, logs, volumes)
Ability to troubleshoot data pipelines and system-level issues


Nice to Have


Experience with Keycloak (identity and access management)
Familiarity with server monitoring and observability tools
Experience with Ansible or infrastructure automation tools
Experience with Python 3 (data processing, scripting, or automation)
Experience with CI/CD pipelines
Familiarity with microservices or distributed systems
Exposure to data orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow, Prefect, Dagster)
Experience with Redis, caching systems, or message brokers



Preferred Background


3+ years of experience in software engineering, full stack development, or data engineering
Experience delivering production-grade applications or data pipelines
Experience working with large datasets or cloud-based systems



Compensation


€35,000 gross annually



Job Details


Job Type: Full Time
Location: Porto, Portugal
Work Model: On-site (office environment required)
Benefits: as required by law



Recruitment Process

Application → Screening Interviews → Technical Evaluation → Final Interview → Decision → Hire → Probation Period Evaluation

DO NOT CONTACT THE HIRING MANAGER DIRECTLY. YOU MUST FOLLOW THE APPLICATION PROCESS.

About us:

Voxelmaps Inc. was originally a spin-off from Navmii, one of the leading navigation and mapping companies in the world. Voxelmap’s mission is to build a true 4D volumetric model of the planet, combining visual, spatial and temporal data to create the most detailed map of the world. It does this using a unique patent-pending technology using MRVOGs (Multi-Resolution, Voxel Occupancy Grids).

The company is headquartered in Austin, Texas, USA and works with some of the world’s largest companies across North America and Europe. Further information: https://www.voxelmaps.com

EEO Statement: Voxelmaps is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment. Supplier shall not discriminate against any worker based on age, disability, ethnicity, gender, marital status, national origin, political affiliation, color, race, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, union membership, protected veteran status, genetic information, or any other status protected by country law, in hiring and other employment practices. Supplier shall not require pregnancy or medical tests, except where required by applicable laws or regulations or prudent for workplace safety, and shall not improperly discriminate based on test results.

DISCLAIMER: All claims and offers to compensation, rewards, and onboarding procedures are at the sole discretion of Voxelmaps.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
A Job? Or a Lifetime Experience? Start Yours Here!




A nossa missão é ser uma parte significativa da carreira das nossas pessoas. À medida que crescemos, cresce também a determinação em oferecer a melhor experiência aos nossos colaboradores e clientes e é exatamente isso que nos move. Somos uma empresa portuguesa de consultoria tecnológica com escritórios em Lisboa, Porto e Óbidos e representações no Brasil e Tunísia. Contamos com mais de 13 anos de expertise no mercado, e hoje somos um universo de cerca de 400 pessoas a trabalhar em contexto presencial, remoto ou híbrido em projetos em mais de 20 países.




Acreditamos que grandes pessoas fazem empresas de sucesso e por isso mesmo defendemos a valorização, reconhecimento e crescimento dos nossos profissionais.




Não queremos ser mais uma linha do teu CV, queremos que connosco vivas uma Lifetime Experience. Apostamos em formações e certificações que confirmam a tua real progressão, na promoção de um saudável work-life balance e na oferta de benefícios com impacto na tua vida pessoal e carreira.




O que procuramos:

Experiência de trabalho com pelo menos uma plataforma de streaming de eventos (Kafka, Pulsar, Amazon Kinesis Data Streams)
3 ou mais anos de experiência como Data Engineer
Fluência na língua inglesa (mínimo B2)




Ser Affinity

#Affinidade – Criares relações de proximidade e empatia com colegas, clientes e candidatos (e não apenas com tecnologias, linguagens e plataformas). Espírito de equipa e boa disposição;
#Ambição – Quereres fazer mais e melhor. Vontade de exceder expectativas e evoluir pessoal e profissionalmente;
#Ação – Energia para fazer acontecer. Mostrares proatividade e capacidade de iniciativa;
#Aprendizagem – Vontade de evoluir individual e coletivamente e tornares-te um expert no mercado tecnológico.




A tua #LifetimeExperience

Participar em projetos nacionais e internacionais numa empresa baseada em relacionamentos pessoais, na simplicidade e na eficiência, com uma ação disruptiva no mercado tecnológico;
Aceder a um plano de carreira e formação personalizado e diretamente proporcional ao teu desempenho e interesse;
Fazer parte de um ambiente acolhedor, de confiança, respeito e informalidade;
Integrar as nossas Affinity Communities (de desporto, tecnologia, hobbies, etc.) e participar ativamente em projetos de responsabilidade social e ambiental;
Tirar partido de um conjunto de benefícios, parcerias, descontos eventos e dinâmicas internas.




Para além da tua satisfação profissional queremos proporcionar-te oportunidades de lazer e convívio memoráveis e dignos de uma experiência Affinity.




Join the Experience!




Envia-nos a tua candidatura e aproveita para nos conhecer e ir acompanhando em:




https://www.instagram.com/affinityportugal/

https://www.linkedin.com/company/2701281/admin/

https://twitter.com/WithAffinity

Title: Junior Data Engineer (Stack Microsoft)
Description:
Enviar-me por email Guardar

A Integer Consulting é uma empresa portuguesa de consultoria em tecnologias de informação. Somos especialistas em serviços de IT outsourcing, software, projetos de nearshore e desenvolvimento à medida. Somos parceiros dos principais players tecnológicos a nível mundial e trabalhamos com empresas nacionais e multinacionais de diversos setores de atividade. A maioria dos projetos em que participamos são em Portugal, no Brasil e um pouco por toda a Europa. O que nos diferencia é o talento tecnológico e a experiência das pessoas que fazem parte da equipa e que integram os nossos projetos.

Procuramos Data Engineers para atuar em projetos de dados com foco na stack Microsoft on-premise, garantindo a construção, manutenção e evolução de pipelines de dados, modelos analíticos e soluções de reporting. A função envolve trabalhar com tecnologias como Microsoft SQL Server, SQL Server Integration Services, SQL Server Analysis Services, SQL Server Reporting Services e Microsoft Power BI.

Este Pode Ser o Desafio Perfeito, Se Tiveres


Licenciatura em Engenharia Informática ou similar (obrigatório).
Familiaridade com pelo menos uma ferramenta da Stack Microsoft (SSIS, SSRS ou Power BI);
Conhecimentos básicos de SQL (queries, joins, agregações);
Noções de ETL e integração de dados;
Conhecimento básico de modelação de dados.


Observação: regime híbrido 1x por semana no Porto.

Title: Distributed Cloud | Power BI Specialist
Description:
At Devoteam, we believe that technology with strong human values can actively drive change for the better. Discover how Tech for People unlocks the future, creating a positive impact on the people and the world around us. We are a global leading player in Digital Transformation for leading organisations across EMEA, with a revenue of €1B. We believe in transforming technology to create value for our clients, partners and employees in a world where technology is developed for people. We are proud of the culture we have built together. We are proud of our people at the service of technology. We are proud of our diverse environment. Because we are #TechforPeople. Join our multidisciplinary team of Cloud experts, Designers, Business consultants, Security experts, Engineers, Developers and other extraordinary talents, spread across more than 20 EMEA countries. Become one of our +10.000 tech and business leaders on cloud, data and cyber security. Let’s fuse creativity with technology together and build innovative solutions that actively change things for the better.

Job Description

We are seeking a sharp and insightful Power BI Specialist to drive our Business Intelligence initiatives. You will be instrumental in translating complex business requirements into clear data models and compelling visualizations, ensuring strategic decision-making across the organization.

Key Responsibilities:


Design and develop dynamic dashboards and reports using Power BI to monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and provide actionable business insights.
Gather and translate business requirements into technical specifications for data modeling and reporting solutions.
Develop, optimize, and execute SQL queries to extract, transform, and prepare data for analysis.
Perform data validation and collaborate with stakeholders to ensure data integrity and quality.
Drive the adoption of self-service BI best practices across the business.



Qualifications


3+ years of proven experience as a Data Analyst or BI Developer.
Strong mandatory proficiency in SQL for querying and manipulating data.
Expert hands-on experience with Microsoft Power BI for data modeling (DAX) and visualization.
Proven ability to successfully elicit and document business requirements.
Language Requirement: Professional fluency (B2+) in French is highly valued and may be a mandatory requirement for allocation on specific projects with Francophone clients.



Additional Information

The Devoteam Group works for equal opportunities, promoting its employees based on merit and actively fights against all forms of discrimination. We are convinced that diversity contributes to the creativity, dynamism and excellence of our organization. All of our vacancies are open to people with disabilities.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
We are looking for a Data Engineer to support corporate IT applications in a cloud-based data analytics environment.




Work setup: Hybrid - Porto




Responsibilities:

Design, implement, and roll out corporate IT applications in a cloud data analytics environment.
Collaborate with business teams to gather requirements and translate them into data solutions.
Work with cross-functional teams to design and deliver scalable analytics solutions.
Implement data integrations and ETL processes across cloud data platforms.
Support data modelling activities for large datasets in Data Lake / Cloud Data Warehouse environments.
Perform performance tuning, maintenance, and support of existing applications.
Contribute to the further development and improvement of current data applications.
Build reporting and visualization capabilities using Power BI and related BI technologies.




Must-have requirements:

3+ years of experience as a Data Engineer in cloud solutions.
Strong understanding of ERP processes, especially Logistics / SCM.
Good knowledge of data modelling concepts in Data Lake or Cloud Data Warehouse environments.
Strong programming skills in Python, PySpark, Java, SQL, or similar languages.
Familiarity with MS Azure cloud platforms.
Proficiency in data modelling, workflows, and data visualization.
Knowledge of MS Power BI and other BI technologies.
Fluent English, spoken and written.




If you’re interested, apply directly or send your CV with your daily rate and availability for a call to j.sierra@asenium.com.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!




We are looking for an Amazing: Senior Data Engineer

Type of position: Hybrid (2x/week) in Porto




The amazing you, will have:




Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field;
5+ years of experience as Data Engineer;
Experience with working on real-time data and streaming applications (Mandatory)
Experience with data engineering and using programming languages, including Java, Scala, or Python (Mandatory)
Experience with distributed data and computing tools, including Kafka, Nifi, Spark, Hadoop, Hive, or Flink (Mandatory)
Pipeline Creation with Stream Processing tools;
Availability for a hybrid regime at Porto (Portugal);
Fluency in English is a (Mandatory, at least B2)




Why should you become part of our family?

You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psicologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!




Who are we?

Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto, Leiria and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

Title: Data Engineer (m/f/d)
Description:
Linde GmbH, Gases Division

Data Engineer (m/f/d)

Porto or Lisbon, Portugal | req29164

What You Will Enjoy Doing


As a data engineer you will focus on building robust data pipelines and data lakehouses to best support the needs of our Data Science, Data Analytics/Reporting teams as well as our internal business partners
You will combine an understanding of business processes and related data with your extraordinary capability in designing and developing targeted and reusable data models and lakehouses
You will ensure reusability, scalablity and consistency of data sources in order to ensure rapid product development and avoid data silos
Furthermore you will play an important role in improving the overall data architecture and platform strategy while also support in creating data engineering best practices
You will shape and enforce data governance standards within the wider Linde organization


What Makes You Great


You possess a minimum of a masters degree from a university in a STEM subject (science technology, engineering or mathematics)
You posses very strong skills in programming and data engineering (SQL /Python /R ) which you combine with a very good understanding of data modelling and data management processes as well as experience in creating data lakehouses or similar concepts preferred
Furthermore you have a good understanding of platform concepts (e.g. Databricks) and system infrastructure and experience in gathering and understanding business requirements and turning them into data models
You combine interest and motivation to continuously learn and develop with excellent spoken and written skills in English
Willingness to travel to collaborate with the wider team and business (

Why you will love working with us

At Linde you will be surrounded by knowledgeable people who love what they do. They are creative and strive to move our company forward. When facing adverse conditions they work out unique technical concepts, in order to find the best solutions for our customers. At the same time we are aware of our responsibility towards the safety of our employees at their workplace.

What we offer you!

At Linde, the sky is not the limit. If you’re looking to build a career where your work reaches beyond your job description and betters the people with whom you work, the communities we serve, and the world in which we all live, at Linde, your opportunities are limitless. Be Linde. Be Limitless.

In addition to an attractive compensation package, we offer you many social benefits, such as an excellent pension plan, flexible working hours and a wide range of health care options. Furthermore, we support you with various offers to help you combine family and career and to support your professional and personal development.

Have we inspired you? Let´s talk about it

We are looking forward to receiving your complete application (motivation letter, CV, certificates) via our online job market.

Any designations used of course apply to persons of all genders. The form of speech used here is for simplicity only.

Linde GmbH, Gases Division acts responsibly towards its shareholders, business partners, employees, society and the environment in every one of its business areas, regions and locations across the globe. The company is committed to technologies and products that unite the goals of customer value and sustainable development.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
🚀 Procuras o próximo passo como Data Analyst?




Então este desafio pode ser para ti.

Estamos à procura de um(a) Data Analyst com forte perfil analítico e orientação para negócio.




🧑 💻 Como será o teu dia a dia:

Analisar datasets grandes e complexos para identificar tendências, oportunidades e insights de negócio
Desenvolver pipelines de dados escaláveis, reporting automatizado e modelos analíticos com Python e Airflow
Trabalhar com serviços GCP, sobretudo BigQuery e Looker, para construir e otimizar workflows analíticos
Desenhar e manter dashboards e KPIs para stakeholders de negócio
Traduzir requisitos de negócio em soluções analíticas e recomendações acionáveis
Colaborar com equipas de engenharia, produto e operações para suportar a tomada de decisão
Fazer validação de dados, quality checks e root-cause analysis
Otimizar queries SQL e melhorar performance de transformações em larga escala




🧠 O que procuramos:

Mais de 4 anos de experiência em data analytics ou business intelligence
Forte domínio de Python para análise de dados e automação
Bons conhecimentos de SQL e experiência com bases de dados relacionais e analíticas em larga escala
Experiência hands-on com Looker e outros produtos GCP
Bons conhecimentos de data modeling, ETL/ELT e analytics engineering
Experiência com Git
Boa capacidade de comunicação e gestão de stakeholders
Inglês fluente
Espírito curioso e gosto por trabalho em equipa




💡 O que oferecemos:

Projeto desafiante com forte componente analítica e impacto no negócio
Ambiente colaborativo e orientado à melhoria contínua
Oportunidade de trabalhar com stack moderna em dados e cloud
Full visa support (se necessário)




📍 Localização: Híbrido, Norte de Portugal




Pacote Salarial Junior: 12.880€ a 21.000€ brutos (14 meses) + Subsídio de Alimentação + Benefícios Flexíveis

Pacote Salarial Mid: 14.000€ a 28.000€ brutos (14 meses) + Subsídio de Alimentação + Benefícios Flexíveis

Pacote Salarial Senior: 20.000€ a 49.000€ brutos (14 meses) + Subsídio de Alimentação + Benefícios Flexíveis

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
🚀 Procuras dar um passo na tua carreira nas áreas de IT e Telecomunicações?

Então chegaste ao sítio certo – à Smart




A tecnologia, a transformação e a inovação fazem parte do nosso ADN.




Somos uma empresa de consultoria tecnológica com mais de uma década de experiência no desenvolvimento de projetos nacionais e internacionais em IT e Telecomunicações e queremos fazer parte da tua história.




🔎 O que precisas para ser um Data Analyst / BI Specialist?

Licenciatura em Engenharia Informática, Tecnologias de Informação, Data Science ou área relacionada
Entre 4 a 6 anos de experiência em análise de dados, business intelligence ou funções similares
Experiência comprovada com Power BI, incluindo criação de dashboards e modelação de dados
Familiaridade com Elasticsearch e execução de queries
Proficiência em Python; conhecimentos básicos de C# são valorizados
Bons conhecimentos de PowerQuery (Power BI)
Forte capacidade analítica e interpretação de datasets complexos
Experiência em ambientes colaborativos e equipas multidisciplinares
Elevada capacidade de resolução de problemas e atenção ao detalhe
Boas competências de comunicação e relacionamento interpessoal




💡 Quais serão as tuas funções?

Desenvolver dashboards interativos e relatórios em Power BI
Modelar, transformar e analisar dados para suporte à decisão
Trabalhar com Elasticsearch para consulta e exploração de dados
Desenvolver scripts em Python para tratamento e automação de dados
Colaborar com diferentes equipas para levantamento de requisitos de negócio
Garantir a qualidade, consistência e fiabilidade dos dados
Identificar tendências, padrões e insights relevantes
Documentar processos e soluções desenvolvidas
Apoiar na otimização de processos de análise e reporting




🌟Porquê juntar-te à nossa equipa?

Tornamos reais os projetos em que participamos.
Valorizamos a qualidade e eficiência no que fazemos.
Somos uma equipa dinâmica, íntegra e de confiança.
Oferecemos ambiente colaborativo e espaço para crescimento profissional.

Porto, hibrido 2x por semana

  • Proficiência em Python; conhecimentos básicos de C# são valorizados
  • Bons conhecimentos de PowerQuery (Power BI)
  • Forte capacidade analítica e interpretação de datasets complexos
  • Experiência em ambientes colaborativos e equipas multidisciplinares
  • Elevada capacidade de resolução de problemas e atenção ao detalhe
  • Boas competências de comunicação e relacionamento interpessoal


💡 Quais serão as tuas funções?

  • Desenvolver dashboards interativos e relatórios em Power BI
  • Modelar, transformar e analisar dados para suporte à decisão
  • Trabalhar com Elasticsearch para consulta e exploração de dados
  • Desenvolver scripts em Python para tratamento e automação de dados
  • Colaborar com diferentes equipas para levantamento de requisitos de negócio
  • Garantir a qualidade, consistência e fiabilidade dos dados
  • Identificar tendências, padrões e insights relevantes
  • Documentar processos e soluções desenvolvidas
  • Apoiar na otimização de processos de análise e reporting


🌟Porquê juntar-te à nossa equipa?

  • Tornamos reais os projetos em que participamos.
  • Valorizamos a qualidade e eficiência no que fazemos.
  • Somos uma equipa dinâmica, íntegra e de confiança.
  • Oferecemos ambiente colaborativo e espaço para crescimento profissional.


📍Onde podes trabalhar?

  • Porto, hibrido 2x por semana


🎓Valores praticados para Júnior

  • Pacote Salarial: 12.880€ a 21.000€ brutos (14 meses) + Subsídio de Alimentação + Benefícios Flexíveis

Valores praticados para Mid

  • Pacote Salarial: 14.000€ a 28.000€ brutos (14 meses) + Subsídio de Alimentação + Benefícios Flexíveis

Valores Praticados para Sénior

  • Pacote Salarial: 20.000€ a 49.000€ brutos (14 meses) + Subsídio de Alimentação + Benefícios Flexíveis

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
We are growing. And we are looking for talented people.




At Decskill, we believe that technological excellence is driven by human talent.

We are an IT consulting company with more than 10 years of consolidated experience in the market, focused on building long-term relationships with both our clients and our people. Today, we are a community of over 800 professionals, working from Lisbon, Porto, and Madrid, contributing to impactful technology initiatives.

As part of the Astek Group, we combine a strong local culture with a global presence, being active in around 23 countries across 4 continents. This allows us to offer an international context, diverse challenges, and long-term career opportunities, while staying close to our teams.




We are looking for an Data Analyst!




Responsabilities:

As a Data Analyst, you will play a vital role in our team. Working directly with one or more of the bank's business areas, you will provide valuable insights to drive business growth, understading their needs, proposing and implementing data-driven solutions (analysis, visualization and automation). You will exercise a lot of problem identification and problem solving skills.
You will have the opportunity to take ownership of business essential analytical projects that involve retrieving, preparing and analysing complex datasets using data/statistical models and best practices in data visualization for the reporting creation, with the goal to produce insights and automated tools that will guide strategic solutions
You will move between technical and non-technical areas and should be able to communicate well with different types of professionals. It is very important to be able to clearly and concisely understand stekeholders’ needs and translate these to our technical team, as well as present the results of complex analysis to our stakeholders.




Requirements:

Academic background in Engineering, Economics, Computing, Mathematics, Statistics or related fields.
Professional experience in any data visualization tool such as Tableau or Power BI.
Professional experience in data analysis with programming, preferably Python (Pandas).
Professional experience in any data visualization tool such as Tableau or Power BI.
Professional experience in data analysis with programming, preferably Python (Pandas).
Ability to analysze, synthetize and simplify.
Knowledge of descriptive statistics and hypothesis testing is a plus.
Knowledge in Big Data technology such as Pyspark, Presto and Airflow is a plus.
Knowledge of Power Query and DAX is a plus.
Good level of English.




Are you looking for an environment that values curiosity and commitment? Here, your contribution has real impact and individual growth is taken seriously.




Find with us the right opportunity to grow!




What you can expect from us

Long-term projects with national and international context
Opportunities to grow technically and professionally
A people-first culture, focused on transparency and trust
Teams that value ownership, collaboration and stability




If you’re interested in this job, please send your CV to cesaltina.abreu@decskill.com with reference “CA/DataAnalyst".




Your next challenge might start here.

Join us! 😊




Decskill is committed to equality and non-discrimination with all our talents. We recruit and promote talent, based on diversity and inclusion, regardless of age, gender, ethnicity, race, nationality or any other form of discrimination incompatible with the dignity of the human being.

Title: Auxiliar de Armazém (m/f)
HTML:
Descrição da Empresa

A SkyNet é uma rede internacional única, operada localmente por empresas de courier licenciadas em exclusivo. Esta estrutura garante proximidade, conhecimento do mercado e a solidez de uma marca global.

Função e Responsabilidades

  • Receção, armazenamento e expedição de mercadoria, carga/descarga;
  • Arrumação e limpeza do armazém, cumprindo os procedimentos da empresa;
  • Picking de mercadoria.

Perfil do Candidato

  • Escolaridade mínima;
  • Gosto pela área da logística;
  • Experiência na função (preferencial);
  • Disponibilidade para trabalhar em horário noturno ou diurno.

O que valorizamos

  • Dinamismo, e boa capacidade de organização;
  • Motivação e espírito de equipa;
  • Boa capacidade de comunicação e foco no cliente;
  • Elevada responsabilidade e sentido de compromisso;
  • Fácil adaptação a novos métodos de trabalho;

O que oferecemos

  • Integração numa empresa sólida;
  • Estabilidade profissional;
  • Ambiente de trabalho colaborativo, com espaço para inovação e crescimento profissional.

Junte-se a uma equipa integrada numa rede global em constante crescimento, onde a inovação e a excelência no serviço são prioridades.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Decskill was founded in 2014 as an IT Consulting Company and their main mission is to delivery value through the knowledge. We enable companies to meet the chalenges of digital world by providing our clients with business models that ensure technological capacity, flexibility and agility. We are more than 500 consultants with offices in Lisbon, Porto and Madrid.




DECSKILL operates in 3 main areas:




DECSKILL TALENT, through which we provide our clients with an extension to their IT teams;




DECSKILL BOOST, through which we provide our client with software development models to increase capacity and optimize Time-to-Market, where we create and manage teams that deliver according to their needs, at the desired speed;




DECSKILL CONNECT through which we provide our client with consulting services, as well as the implementation and management of information technology infrastructures.




Our practice results in the creation of value for our customers, either by delivering qualified and value-added services, or through highly qualified and motivated professionals, as well as technology solutions that allow us to operate and transform the business of our customers.




We are looking for a Data Analyst:




RESPONSABILITIES:

As a Data Analyst, you will play a vital role in our team.
Working directly with one or more of the bank's business areas, you will provide valuable insights to drive business growth, understading their needs, proposing and implementing data-driven solutions (analysis, visualization and automation). You will exercise a lot of problem identification and problem solving skills.
You will have the opportunity to take ownership of business essential analytical projects that involve retrieving, preparing and analysing complex datasets using data/statistical models and best practices in data visualization for the reporting creation, with the goal to produce insights and automated tools that will guide strategic solutions
You will move between technical and non-technical areas and should be able to communicate well with different types of professionals.
It is very important to be able to clearly and concisely understand stekeholders’ needs and translate these to our technical team, as well as present the results of complex analysis to our stakeholders.




TECHNICAL SKILLS:

Academic background in Engineering, Economics, Computing, Mathematics, Statistics or related fields
Professional experience in any data visualization tool such as Tableau or Power BI
Professional experience in data analysis with programming, preferably Python (Pandas)
Professional experience in any data visualization tool such as Tableau or Power BI
Professional experience in data analysis with programming, preferably Python (Pandas)
Ability to analysze, synthetize and simplify.
Knowledge of descriptive statistics and hypothesis testing is a plus.
Knowledge in Big Data technology such as Pyspark, Presto and Airflow is a plus
Knowledge of Power Query and DAX is a plus




IDIOMAS:

Inglês - Avançado- (Obrigatório)
Francês - Noções - PLUS

Title: Assistente Educativo
HTML:
O Grande Colégio Universal está a recrutar: Assistente Educativo(a) Local: Porto | Regime: Tempo integral | Início: maio de ****O Grande Colégio Universal, instituição centenária de referência no panorama educativo nacional, pretende reforçar a sua equipa pedagógica com a contratação de um(a) Assistente Educativo(a).

Perfil pretendido:

  • Habilitações mínimas ao nível do 12.o ano (formação na área da educação ou ação educativa será valorizada);
  • Experiência anterior em contexto educativo ou com crianças/jovens (preferencial);
  • Capacidade de acompanhamento e apoio a alunos em contexto escolar;
  • Sentido de responsabilidade, empatia, organização e discrição;
  • Boa capacidade de comunicação e relacionamento interpessoal;
  • Espírito de equipa, proatividade e atitude colaborativa.Funções principais:
  • Apoio aos docentes nas atividades letivas e não letivas;
  • Acompanhamento e vigilância dos alunos nos diferentes espaços da escola;
  • Apoio ao funcionamento do refeitório escolar, assegurando o serviço aos alunos durante os período de refeição;
  • Apoio ao bem-estar, segurança e integração dos alunos;
  • Articulação com os diversos serviços da escola.Oferecemos:
  • Integração numa instituição sólida, com ambiente educativo estável e colaborativo;
  • Formação inicial e contínua ajustada às funções;
  • Boas condições de trabalho e valorização do desempenho individual.Se valoriza o trabalho educativo, o espírito de serviço e gostaria de integrar uma equipa comprometida com o desenvolvimento integral dos alunos, envie a sua candidatura (CV + Carta de Motivação) até 20 de maio de **** para: ******ça parte do dia a dia de uma escola com história, centrada no futuro.

Title: Secretária (M/F)
HTML:
O Banco Carregosa é uma instituição privada que se dedica à oferta de produtos e serviços de gestão e aconselhamento nas áreas da poupança e investimento, tendo como visão ser a referência de Wealth Management em Portugal. Com sede no Porto e escritórios em Lisboa, a sua atuação é pautada pela transparência, independência, personalização, inovação e sustentabilidade. Conta atualmente com um universo de mais de 100 colaboradores.


Para integrar o Departamento de Secretariado do Banco Carregosa, procuramos para o Porto um profissional que terá como responsabilidade secretariar a Administração.


Requisitos e competências:

  • Formação técnico-profissional em Secretariado ou outra considerada relevante para o exercício da função;
  • Experiência profissional mínima de 5 anos, no exercício de funções similares;
  • Conhecimentos informáticos na ótica do utilizador;
  • Domínio do Inglês, falado e escrito (conhecimentos de Francês, Espanhol e Alemão valorizados);
  • Comunicação e relacionamento interpessoal;
  • Competências de arquivo e gestão documental, administrativas e de normas e procedimentos.


Se procura uma oportunidade profissional desafiante, com uma forte aposta no desenvolvimento de competências pessoais e profissionais, bem como a integração na área de Secretariado, candidate-se em www.bancocarregosa.com > Carreiras > Ofertas de emprego ou envie o seu CV para o email pessoasecultura@bancocarregosa.com.
